TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ulay == Gaga mniq Sinpeysu Uraycyu ka alang Ulay. 871 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,734 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 41% niqan 1,130 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 59% niqan 1,604 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 37%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Paiwan 1%. Ulay Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Ulay. 189 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 511 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 92% niqan 468 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 8% niqan 43 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 86%, Saysiyat 3%, ni rahuq na o 2%. Hangan alang Hangan alang Alang Cing-cyueyn(Ulay) Thuyang alang Pnseanak alang Paru bi brnuxan ayug yayung ni alang. Nniqan alang Sin-cu-seyn Wu-fung-syang Taw-san-cun. Klbangan Llbangan Gaga meigi ni daya qsiya ayug Sang-ping-si. Kndkilan lnglingay Llingay nniqan brnuxan. Kklaan ppanan Pgkla ppanan rulu kung-ru:Paah wayay elug pstlaway Sin-cu, mquri seyn-taw 122 rmgriq rulu, muda Cu-tung, Wu-fung mnuda elug bling Taw-san do uxay biyaw dhuq da. ‚óéDuma:Kndadax Sin-cu-s teapa Sin-cu Qe-yun mquri Cu- tung, kiya ni kndadaxCu-tung priyux rulu teapa Sin-cu qe-yunmquri Cing-cyueyn do kika pdhuq da. Mlutuc syusan teync Mlutuc teyn-c ti-tu.teyn-c ti-tu alang. Nniqan seejiq alang Klgan seejiq alang Atayal. Skari kari Skari kari kari Atayal, kari Tlu. Snhiyaan Snhiyan cung-cyaw Teyn-cu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pnyahan alang Kla knbrxan alang Pay-ran Saysyac ka dxgal, yaa bi brah 120 hngkawas siida, yaasa mrana ka seejiq Pa-lay-se, ini tuku mduuy ka dxgal da. Kika mquri seejiq Pay-ran- se kmbarux dxgal, niqan 12 tnsapah 63 hiyi thjil Cing-cyueyn phiyug kingal bgurah se. Kklaan rrigaw Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang pusu sqyanan dxgal:‚óéqhjing Cing-cyueyn, tglaq Tu-cang, Sing-cu Wu-fung Syuey-pa dxgalan msangay qtaan kwan-kwang. ‚óé qhjing Cing-cyueyn Snlayan hngkawas 2, klwaan Tanah Tunux siida ida "qhjing Cing-sang" ka hangan na han, ida kuxul bi niqan hangan Tanah Tunux. Saw ka Cin-tay-sklaun bi ana ima na Cang-saw-sway Syuey-rang, wun-syuey cwo-cya San-maw dnii ga ida mnsblayiq trbu suyang balay qhjing jwo-cin-sing tan-swan hinikana. Meiyah mniq dgiyaq hini msangay o ida pnseanak bi nniqan. Qmita phpah snegil ka srnabaw, qmbahang uyas kjiyac ka rbagan, qmita wasaw dara ka krbuhan, qmita huda ka misan, knsuyang kingal hngkwasan o tduwa trbu qhjing nganguc ni qtaan kana, tduwa ksun" knsuyang nniqan" ka hini. Pnyahan bnatas Qtaan bnatas Kndusan Atayal-Tnhjilan ni knrana alang Kaji ttgsa Atayal Taw-san
S.PHON: == ulaj == gaga mniq sinp…ôsu u…ĺaj ¶ju ka alaŇč ulaj. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%, paiwan *%. ulaj gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč ulaj. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn(ulaj) tńßujaŇč alaŇč pns…ôanak alaŇč pa…ĺu bi b…ĺnuxan ajug jajuŇč ni alaŇč. nniqan alaŇč sin- ¶u-s…ôn wu-*uŇč-sjaŇč taw-san- ¶un. klbaŇčan llbaŇčan gaga m…ôigi ni daja qsija ajug saŇč-piŇč-si. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj lliŇčaj nniqan b…ĺnuxan. kklaan ppanan pgkla ppanan …ĺulu kuŇč-…ĺu:paańß wajaj …ôlug pstlawaj sin- ¶u, mqu…ĺi s…ôn-taw *** …ĺmg…ĺiq …ĺulu, muda ¶u-tuŇč, wu-*uŇč mnuda …ôlug bliŇč taw-san do uxaj bijaw dńßuq da. *duma:kndadax sin- ¶u-s t…ôapa sin- ¶u q…ô-jun mqu…ĺi ¶u- tuŇč, kija ni kndadax ¶u-tuŇč p…ĺijux …ĺulu t…ôapa sin- ¶u q…ô-junmqu…ĺi ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn do kika pdńßuq da. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn ¶ mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu.t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč atajal. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijaan snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw t…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pnjańßan alaŇč kla knb…ĺxan alaŇč paj-…ĺan sajsja ¶ ka dxgal, jaa bi b…ĺańß *** ńßŇčkawas siida, jaasa m…ĺana ka s…ô…ô…üiq pa-laj-s…ô, ini tuku mduuj ka dxgal da. kika mqu…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq paj-…ĺan- s…ô kmba…ĺux dxgal, niqan ** tnsapańß ** ńßiji tńß…üil ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn pńßijug kiŇčal bgu…ĺańß s…ô. kklaan …ĺ…ĺigaw pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč pusu sqjanan dxgal:*qńß…üiŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn, tglaq tu- ¶aŇč, siŇč- ¶u wu-*uŇč sju…ô-pa dxgalan msaŇčaj qtaan kwan-kwaŇč. * qńß…üiŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn snlajan ńßŇčkawas *, klwaan tanańß tunux siida ida "qńß…üiŇč ¶iŇč-saŇč" ka ńßaŇčan na ńßan, ida kuxul bi niqan ńßaŇčan tanańß tunux. saw ka ¶in-taj-sklaun bi ana ima na ¶aŇč-saw-swaj sju…ô-…ĺaŇč, wun-sju…ô ¶wo- ¶ja san-maw dnii ga ida mnsblajiq t…ĺbu sujaŇč balaj qńß…üiŇč …üwo- ¶in-siŇč tan-swan ńßinikana. m…ôijańß mniq dgijaq ńßini msaŇčaj o ida pns…ôanak bi nniqan. qmita pńßpańß sn…ôgil ka s…ĺnabaw, qmbańßaŇč ujas k…üija ¶ ka …ĺbagan, qmita wasaw da…ĺa ka k…ĺbuńßan, qmita ńßuda ka misan, knsujaŇč kiŇčal ńßŇčkwasan o tduwa t…ĺbu qńß…üiŇč ŇčaŇču ¶ ni qtaan kana, tduwa ksun" knsujaŇč nniqan" ka ńßini. pnjańßan bnatas qtaan bnatas kndusan atajal-tnńß…üilan ni kn…ĺana alaŇč ka…üi ttgsa atajal taw-san
S.FORM: == Ulay == Gaga mniq Sinpeysu Uraycyu ka alang Ulay. 871 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,734 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 41% niqan 1,130 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 59% niqan 1,604 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 37%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Paiwan 1%. Ulay Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Ulay. 189 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 511 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 92% niqan 468 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 8% niqan 43 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 86%, Saysiyat 3%, ni rahuq na o 2%. Hangan alang Hangan alang Alang Cing-cyueyn(Ulay) Thuyang alang Pnseanak alang Paru bi brnuxan ayug yayung ni alang. Nniqan alang Sin-cu-seyn Wu-fung-syang Taw-san-cun. Klbangan Llbangan Gaga meigi ni daya qsiya ayug Sang-ping-si. Kndkilan lnglingay Llingay nniqan brnuxan. Kklaan ppanan Pgkla ppanan rulu kung-ru:Paah wayay elug pstlaway Sin-cu, mquri seyn-taw 122 rmgriq rulu, muda Cu-tung, Wu-fung mnuda elug bling Taw-san do uxay biyaw dhuq da. ‚óéDuma:Kndadax Sin-cu-s teapa Sin-cu Qe-yun mquri Cu- tung, kiya ni kndadaxCu-tung priyux rulu teapa Sin-cu qe-yunmquri Cing-cyueyn do kika pdhuq da. Mlutuc syusan teync Mlutuc teyn-c ti-tu.teyn-c ti-tu alang. Nniqan seejiq alang Klgan seejiq alang Atayal. Skari kari Skari kari kari Atayal, kari Tlu. Snhiyaan Snhiyan cung-cyaw Teyn-cu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pnyahan alang Kla knbrxan alang Pay-ran Saysyac ka dxgal, yaa bi brah 120 hngkawas siida, yaasa mrana ka seejiq Pa-lay-se, ini tuku mduuy ka dxgal da. Kika mquri seejiq Pay-ran- se kmbarux dxgal, niqan 12 tnsapah 63 hiyi thjil Cing-cyueyn phiyug kingal bgurah se. Kklaan rrigaw Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang pusu sqyanan dxgal:‚óéqhjing Cing-cyueyn, tglaq Tu-cang, Sing-cu Wu-fung Syuey-pa dxgalan msangay qtaan kwan-kwang. ‚óé qhjing Cing-cyueyn Snlayan hngkawas 2, klwaan Tanah Tunux siida ida "qhjing Cing-sang" ka hangan na han, ida kuxul bi niqan hangan Tanah Tunux. Saw ka Cin-tay-sklaun bi ana ima na Cang-saw-sway Syuey-rang, wun-syuey cwo-cya San-maw dnii ga ida mnsblayiq trbu suyang balay qhjing jwo-cin-sing tan-swan hinikana. Meiyah mniq dgiyaq hini msangay o ida pnseanak bi nniqan. Qmita phpah snegil ka srnabaw, qmbahang uyas kjiyac ka rbagan, qmita wasaw dara ka krbuhan, qmita huda ka misan, knsuyang kingal hngkwasan o tduwa trbu qhjing nganguc ni qtaan kana, tduwa ksun" knsuyang nniqan" ka hini. Pnyahan bnatas Qtaan bnatas Kndusan Atayal-Tnhjilan ni knrana alang Kaji ttgsa Atayal Taw-san

na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *,*** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%, paiwan *%. ulaj gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč ulaj. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn(ulaj) tńßujaŇč alaŇč pns…ôanak alaŇč pa…ĺu bi b…ĺnuxan ajug jajuŇč ni alaŇč. nniqan alaŇč sin- ¶u-s…ôn wu-*uŇč-sjaŇč taw-san- ¶un. klbaŇčan llbaŇčan gaga m…ôigi ni daja qsija ajug saŇč-piŇč-si. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj lliŇčaj nniqan b…ĺnuxan. kklaan ppanan pgkla ppanan …ĺulu kuŇč-…ĺu:paańß wajaj …ôlug pstlawaj sin- ¶u, mqu…ĺi s…ôn-taw *** …ĺmg…ĺiq …ĺulu, muda ¶u-tuŇč, wu-*uŇč mnuda …ôlug bliŇč taw-san do uxaj bijaw dńßuq da. *duma:kndadax sin- ¶u-s t…ôapa sin- ¶u q…ô-jun mqu…ĺi ¶u- tuŇč, kija ni kndadax ¶u-tuŇč p…ĺijux …ĺulu t…ôapa sin- ¶u q…ô-junmqu…ĺi ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn do kika pdńßuq da. mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn ¶ mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu.t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. nniqan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč atajal. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi atajal, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijaan snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw t…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pnjańßan alaŇč kla knb…ĺxan alaŇč paj-…ĺan sajsja ¶ ka dxgal, jaa bi b…ĺańß *** ńßŇčkawas siida, jaasa m…ĺana ka s…ô…ô…üiq pa-laj-s…ô, ini tuku mduuj ka dxgal da. kika mqu…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq paj-…ĺan- s…ô kmba…ĺux dxgal, niqan ** tnsapańß ** ńßiji tńß…üil ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn pńßijug kiŇčal bgu…ĺańß s…ô. kklaan …ĺ…ĺigaw pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč pusu sqjanan dxgal:*qńß…üiŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn, tglaq tu- ¶aŇč, siŇč- ¶u wu-*uŇč sju…ô-pa dxgalan msaŇčaj qtaan kwan-kwaŇč. * qńß…üiŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ju…ôn snlajan ńßŇčkawas *, klwaan tanańß tunux siida ida "qńß…üiŇč ¶iŇč-saŇč" ka ńßaŇčan na ńßan, ida kuxul bi niqan ńßaŇčan tanańß tunux. saw ka ¶in-taj-sklaun bi ana ima na ¶aŇč-saw-swaj sju…ô-…ĺaŇč, wun-sju…ô ¶wo- ¶ja san-maw dnii ga ida mnsblajiq t…ĺbu sujaŇč balaj qńß…üiŇč …üwo- ¶in-siŇč tan-swan ńßinikana. m…ôijańß mniq dgijaq ńßini msaŇčaj o ida pns…ôanak bi nniqan. qmita pńßpańß sn…ôgil ka s…ĺnabaw, qmbańßaŇč ujas k…üija ¶ ka …ĺbagan, qmita wasaw da…ĺa ka k…ĺbuńßan, qmita ńßuda ka misan, knsujaŇč kiŇčal ńßŇčkwasan o tduwa t…ĺbu qńß…üiŇč ŇčaŇču ¶ ni qtaan kana, tduwa ksun" knsujaŇč nniqan" ka ńßini. pnjańßan bnatas qtaan bnatas kndusan atajal-tnńß…üilan ni kn…ĺana alaŇč ka…üi ttgsa atajal taw-san
